subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest in remembrance of God in this glorious age and blessed century, when the resplendent Sun of the divine world shineth forth from the East [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی در این عصر مجید و قرن سعید که آفتاب انور جهان الهی شرق و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
